control_objective: Ensure only authorized users retain access to sensitive academic records based on current job responsibilities.
control_activity: Perform quarterly user access review and role recertification for Admin Portal and IAM users. Document reviewer, exceptions, approvals, and removal actions.
evidence_required: User-role export, access review worksheet, exception list, removal confirmation, reviewer sign-off
nist_80053_family: AC - Access Control; IA - Identification and Authentication
iso27001_theme: Access control; confidentiality; management review evidence
cobit_theme: APO13 / DSS05 security management and access governance concept
control_maturity: Access review exists conceptually, but periodic recertification evidence is not fully standardized.
source_reference: NIST CSF PR.AA/GV.RR/GV.OV; NIST SP 800-53 AC/IA; CIS Account Management; COBIT governance concepts; Indonesia PDP Law
notes: Primary control for unauthorized access risk.

control_objective: Ensure sensitive data access is provisioned, changed, and revoked based on approved role and lifecycle events.
control_activity: Require formal access request approval for sensitive modules and reconcile active accounts against HR or role-change records for joiner, mover, and leaver events.
control_owner: IT Admin / HR Coordinator / Data Owner
evidence_required: Access request form, approval record, active user list, HR role-change list, deactivation evidence
nist_80053_family: AC - Access Control; IA - Identification and Authentication; PT - PII Processing and Transparency
iso27001_theme: Access control; confidentiality; privacy-aware data handling
cobit_theme: APO13 / DSS05 security management; governance accountability concept
control_maturity: Access approval exists, but user lifecycle reconciliation and revocation evidence are incomplete.
source_reference: NIST CSF PR.AA/PR.DS/GV.PO; NIST SP 800-53 AC/IA/PT; CIS Data Protection; COBIT governance concepts; Indonesia PDP Law
notes: Maps to both privacy and user lifecycle risks.

control_objective: Detect and investigate unusual privileged activities that could affect sensitive academic records or system integrity.
control_activity: Review admin activity logs on a defined schedule, record exceptions, assign follow-up actions, and retain log review evidence.
evidence_required: Admin activity log extract, log review checklist, exception register, reviewer sign-off, follow-up ticket
control_maturity: System logs are assumed to exist, but periodic review and exception tracking are not consistently documented.
source_reference: NIST CSF DE.CM/GV.OV; NIST SP 800-53 AU; CIS Audit Log Management; COBIT monitoring concept
notes: This control will likely generate a medium-severity finding in Step 5.

control_objective: Ensure critical data and services can be restored within expected recovery needs after disruption.
control_activity: Perform documented backup restoration testing for critical academic database and backup storage. Record scope, result, issue, recovery time, and sign-off.
evidence_required: Backup schedule, restore test log, restoration screenshot, recovery result, issue log, management sign-off
control_maturity: Backup activity is assumed, but restoration test evidence is not available in the simulated assessment.
source_reference: NIST CSF RC.RP/PR.DS/ID.IM; NIST SP 800-53 CP; ISO 27001 availability concept; CIS Data Recovery; COBIT continuity concept

control_objective: Ensure system changes are approved, tested, documented, and traceable before release.
control_activity: Use a standard change request process requiring business approval, technical review, UAT evidence, rollback notes, and release confirmation.
evidence_required: Change request form, approval record, UAT result, rollback plan, release note, post-change review
nist_80053_family: CM - Configuration Management; SA - System and Services Acquisition
control_maturity: Change approval is assumed, but UAT evidence and rollback documentation are inconsistent.
source_reference: NIST CSF PR.PS/GV.OV; NIST SP 800-53 CM/SA; CIS Secure Configuration; COBIT BAI06 managed IT changes concept
notes: Important control for system release governance.

control_objective: Ensure incidents are classified, escalated, communicated, and resolved consistently based on severity.
control_activity: Define incident severity matrix, escalation SLA, communication owner, ticket categorization, and post-incident review requirement.
evidence_required: Incident ticket, severity classification, escalation log, communication note, resolution record, post-incident review
iso27001_theme: Incident management; response coordination; availability protection
cobit_theme: DSS02 managed service requests and incidents concept
control_maturity: Tickets are assumed to exist, but severity classification and escalation SLA are not fully standardized.
source_reference: NIST CSF RS.MA/RS.CO/RS.AN; NIST SP 800-53 IR; CIS Incident Response Management; COBIT service request/incident concept

control_objective: Ensure vendor dependency, support responsibilities, and escalation paths are reviewed and traceable.
control_activity: Maintain vendor contact, SLA, support scope, escalation path, and periodic SLA review for third-party or SaaS-supported academic services.
evidence_required: Vendor SLA document, support contact list, escalation matrix, review meeting note, issue resolution record
cobit_theme: APO10 managed vendors / supplier governance concept
control_maturity: Vendor dependency is recognized, but SLA review evidence is not fully formalized.
source_reference: NIST CSF GV.SC/GV.OV; NIST SP 800-53 SR; CIS Service Provider Management; COBIT APO10 vendor management concept

control_objective: Ensure personal data retention and deletion are justified, documented, and periodically reviewed.
control_activity: Define retention rules for student-related records, review records exceeding retention need, and document deletion or retention justification.
evidence_required: Data retention schedule, retention review worksheet, deletion approval, exception register, policy review note
nist_80053_family: PT - PII Processing and Transparency; MP - Media Protection
cobit_theme: APO14 managed data / governance of information concept
control_maturity: No formal retention schedule or deletion review evidence is assumed in the simulated assessment.
source_reference: NIST CSF PR.DS/GV.PO/GV.OC; NIST SP 800-53 PT/MP; ISO 27001 confidentiality concept; Indonesia PDP Law

control_objective: Reduce risk of credential mishandling, social engineering, and improper handling of sensitive academic data.
control_activity: Deliver periodic security and privacy awareness training for staff with access to academic services and track completion.
frequency: Annual; onboarding; after major policy update
evidence_required: Training material, attendance/completion report, quiz result, reminder notice, exception follow-up
iso27001_theme: Awareness, education, and training; confidentiality protection
cobit_theme: APO07 human resources competency and awareness concept
control_maturity: Training may exist informally, but completion tracking and role-based awareness evidence are weak.
source_reference: NIST CSF PR.AT/GV.RR; NIST SP 800-53 AT; CIS Security Awareness and Skills Training; COBIT APO07 people/skills concept
notes: Human risk control for admin users.

control_objective: Ensure management reports and payment-related status are accurate, complete, and reconciled before use.
control_activity: Perform reporting data validation and reconciliation checks for key academic, payment status, and dashboard metrics. Document exceptions and correction actions.
control_owner: BI / Reporting Owner / Finance Data Owner
evidence_required: Validation checklist, reconciliation report, exception log, correction record, dashboard refresh note
cobit_theme: APO14 managed data / information quality governance concept
control_maturity: Validation is assumed to happen, but reconciliation evidence and exception tracking are not consistently documented.
source_reference: NIST CSF ID.IM/PR.DS; NIST SP 800-53 SI; ISO 27001 integrity concept; COBIT information quality concept
notes: Maps to reporting and data integrity risks.

control_objective: Ensure course registration and academic services have continuity readiness during peak operational periods.
control_activity: Prepare and test continuity readiness for registration peak periods, including fallback process, support contact list, communication plan, and recovery check.
frequency: Before peak registration period; Annual review
evidence_required: Continuity checklist, peak readiness review, support roster, communication plan, test result, issue follow-up
control_maturity: Continuity need is recognized, but walkthrough and peak-period evidence are incomplete.
source_reference: NIST CSF RC.RP/GV.RM/ID.IM; NIST SP 800-53 CP; ISO 27001 availability concept; COBIT continuity concept

control_objective: Ensure document request closure is supported by processing evidence, approval trail, and reviewability.
control_activity: Require completion evidence and approval record before document requests can be closed. Perform periodic sample review of closed requests.
evidence_required: Request record, approval note, fulfillment evidence, closure timestamp, sample review sheet
cobit_theme: MEA01 performance and conformance monitoring / documentation governance concept
control_maturity: Workflow records exist, but sample review and evidence completeness are not yet formalized.
source_reference: NIST CSF GV.OV/PR.PS; NIST SP 800-53 PL/CM; COBIT documentation and conformance monitoring concept
notes: Strengthens evidence trail and audit readiness.

control_objective: Ensure known vulnerabilities affecting in-scope assets are identified, prioritized, assigned, and tracked to remediation.
control_activity: Maintain vulnerability backlog linked to assets, severity, owner, due date, remediation status, and closure evidence. Optionally enrich using public NVD/CVE references.
frequency: Monthly; after security advisory or vendor notification
evidence_required: Vulnerability backlog, severity rating, owner assignment, remediation ticket, vendor advisory, closure evidence
nist_80053_family: RA - Risk Assessment; SI - System and Information Integrity
iso27001_theme: Vulnerability management; risk treatment; CIA protection
cobit_theme: APO12 managed risk / DSS05 security services concept
control_maturity: No formal vulnerability backlog or patch tracking evidence is assumed in the simulated assessment.
source_reference: NIST CSF ID.RA/PR.PS/DE.CM; NIST SP 800-53 RA/SI; CIS Continuous Vulnerability Management; optional NVD reference; COBIT APO12 managed risk concept
notes: Optional NVD vulnerability data may be added in a later enhancement.

control_objective: Reduce risk of uncontrolled personal data export from academic modules or reports.
control_activity: Require approval and log review for bulk exports containing student personal data, including business purpose, requester, approver, data scope, and retention note.
evidence_required: Export request log, approval record, data scope note, monthly export review, exception register
nist_80053_family: AC - Access Control; AU - Audit and Accountability; PT - PII Processing and Transparency
cobit_theme: APO14 managed data / compliance monitoring concept
control_maturity: Enhancement control proposed to strengthen personal data handling and privacy auditability.
source_reference: NIST CSF GV.PO/PR.DS/DE.CM; NIST SP 800-53 AC/AU/PT; CIS Data Protection; Indonesia PDP Law
notes: Planned enhancement beyond baseline synthetic controls.

control_objective: Improve audit-readiness by centralizing required evidence for key GRC controls.
control_activity: Maintain a structured evidence repository that links control ID, evidence owner, frequency, evidence status, reviewer, and review date.
frequency: Monthly evidence status update; Quarterly management review
evidence_required: Evidence tracker, repository index, reviewer notes, missing evidence list, management review summary
nist_80053_family: CA - Assessment, Authorization, and Monitoring; PL - Planning
iso27001_theme: Audit readiness; governance monitoring; management review
cobit_theme: MEA01 / MEA02 monitoring and control assessment concept
control_maturity: Enhancement control proposed to improve evidence monitoring across multiple control areas.
source_reference: NIST CSF GV.OV/GV.RM/ID.IM; NIST SP 800-53 CA/PL; NIST SP 800-53A assessment concepts; COBIT MEA monitoring concepts
notes: Will connect directly to Step 8 evidence tracker.
